"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\mbl_core.bin.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\mbl_core.bin.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\mbl_core.bin.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\mbl_core.bin.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o mbl_core.bin.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmbl_core.bin.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\mbl_core.bin.dir\linkLibs.rsp
